public_reputation: Custodian of devotional gardens whose labor supports mourning, contemplation, and ceremonial calm.
manner: Carries the habits of a garden tender whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Elysian Grove.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of garden tender in and around Elysian Grove, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Elysian Grove workable through the obligations of garden tender while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of garden tender credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Elysian Grove.

Garden Tender Osric Pellor becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a garden tender.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Garden Tender Osric Pellor is readable as a garden tender tied to Elysian Grove.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Elysian Grove: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Garden Tender Osric Pellor presents as someone shaped by the duties of a garden tender and the daily pressures of Elysian Grove.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a garden tender, and proof that strangers will not make Elysian Grove harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Garden Tender Osric Pellor refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a garden tender too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Garden Tender Osric Pellor can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Garden Tender Osric Pellor adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Garden Tender Osric Pellor always knows more about Elysian Grove than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to garden tender duties in Elysian Grove.
